title: OhmaticCircuitV01
description: Ohmatic v0.1 circuit schematic — single source of truth

metadata.description: Circuit-level metadata. `version` must be `"0.1"`; additional properties allowed.

title.description: Human-readable name for this circuit, e.g. "555 Timer Astable Oscillator".

description.description: Plain-English description of what this circuit does.

version.description: Schema version. Must be the string literal "0.1".

tags.description: Freeform tags for search and categorisation, e.g. ["timer", "oscillator"]. At least one tag required.

components.description: Ordered list of components placed on the schematic. At least one component required.

id.description: Unique component identifier. Pattern: `^[A-Z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*$` (e.g. R1, C_bypass, VCC1).

type.description: Component class; one of the enumerated values.

value.description: Component value as a human-readable string, e.g. "10kΩ", "100nF", "555".

x.description: X position of the component on the schematic canvas. Number; no bounds enforced (verifier normalises to 0–300).

y.description: Y position of the component on the schematic canvas. Number; no bounds enforced (verifier normalises to 0–300).

pins.description: Map of pin names to net labels (e.g. {"1": "VCC", "base": "NODE_A"}). At least one entry required.

nets.description: Electrical nets connecting component pins. At least one net required.

name.description: Net name, e.g. "VCC", "GND", "NODE_A". Must be unique within the circuit.

pins.description: Component-pin references in `ComponentId.pin_name` format (e.g. ["R1.1", "VCC1.1"]). At least 2 required.
